overall.description: Third-person game footage showing a character in a dark red coat exploring a moonlit coastal landscape. The character walks from a rocky beach with concrete ruins, through shallow ocean waters with a distant castle visible, and inland through grassy meadows with grazing sheep.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky beach with concrete bunker ruins

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the dark sandy beach toward the water, passing large angular concrete structures on the right

entered.detail: large angular concrete ruins resembling military bunkers with weathered surfaces
dark ocean water with gentle waves lapping at the shore
grass-covered rocky cliff face rising above the beach
faint silhouette of a castle or fortification visible on the horizon across the water

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a dark sandy beach at night, passing large concrete bunker ruins on the right. The ocean stretches out to the left, and a distant castle is barely visible on the horizon under a starry sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: shallow coastal waters with view of distant castle

events.description: character walks from sandy beach into shallow ocean water
character turns to face the open ocean and survey the distant castle

agents.ego_description: wading through shallow ocean water and looking around at the coastal landscape and distant castle

segments.scene_description: The character enters the shallow ocean water, wading through the surf while looking toward a distant castle visible across the water. The concrete ruins fall behind as the character moves deeper into the coastal waters.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky shoreline transitioning to inland grass

events.description: character exits the water and returns to the rocky shore
terrain changes from rocky beach to grassy hillside

agents.ego_description: walking along the rocky shore away from the water, heading toward grassy inland areas

entered.detail: green grass-covered slope leading inland from the beach

segments.scene_description: The character leaves the water and walks along the rocky shoreline, moving inland toward grassy hills. The ocean and distant castle fade from view as the character approaches the rocky cliffs and green slopes.

scene_state.functional_zone: grassy coastal meadow with grazing animals

events.description: grazing sheep become visible on the right hillside

agents.ego_description: walking through the grassy meadow past grazing livestock, heading toward a wooden fence in the distance

notable_agents.action: sheep grazing peacefully on the grassy hillside

entered.detail: low crumbling stone wall running along the left side of the path
wooden fence posts ahead marking the boundary of the meadow

segments.scene_description: The character moves through a grassy meadow at night, passing a stone wall on the left and sheep grazing on the right. The terrain is lush and green, with a wooden fence visible ahead marking the path forward.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a desolate, moonlit beach into a lush, inland meadow. It begins with the character walking along dark sands past concrete bunker ruins, with a distant castle barely visible on the horizon under a starry sky. As the character wades into the shallow ocean surf, the ruins fall behind and the focus shifts toward the castle across the water. The scene then moves along a rocky shoreline and turns inland, causing the ocean and distant architecture to fade from view as the terrain rises into green slopes. Finally, the camera follows the character through a grassy meadow, passing a stone wall and grazing sheep before approaching a wooden fence that marks the path forward.
